providers.comment: Primary — flat-fee Pro account; zero per-call cost
Fast + capable backup; generous free tier
Fast inference; free tier covers low-volume hackathon use
Dormant — only activates if ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set

telegram.comment: Telegram I/O lives in our MCP tool path: /api/telegram/webhook receives updates and notifyAgent (packages/agent/src/mcp-tools/index.ts) calls the Bot API directly for outbound. This is Vercel-hosted and bulletproof; the Gateway is not in the chat loop for Telegram. Flip enabled=true here only after you've verified the Gateway host can hold both bot libraries (~250-300 MB combined) — GCP e2-micro Always Free with 2 GB swap qualifies.

discord.comment: Same pattern as telegram: /api/discord/interactions handles inbound, notifyAgent calls Discord Bot API for outbound DMs and approve/reject embeds. Gateway not in the loop. Flip on once Gateway hosting is RAM-stable.

slack.comment: Scaffold. Unlike telegram/discord, we have no MCP-tool-direct path for Slack — activating Slack means letting the Gateway own it. Flip enabled=true after pasting credentials in /setup wizard. ~30 minutes setup.

whatsapp.comment: Scaffold-only. Activation requires Meta Business Verification (3-10 days) and a 24-hour-window template policy. Flip enabled=true after verification clears.
